title: Barefoot Squadron
content:

|founded=[[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]]–[[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]<ref name="Note">''[[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia]]'' mentions that [[Tahiri Veila]] participated in the [[Battle of Borleias (Yuuzhan Vong War; Second)|Battle of Borleias]] before taking [[Commanding officer/Legends|command]] of Barefoot Squadron at its formation. Therefore, the [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] must have been formed sometime between the battle in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]] and the events of ''Ylesia'' in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], with both dates coming from ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''.</ref>

{{Quote|Her pilots are very protective of her. They call themselves Barefoot Squadron.|[[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]], on Tahiri Veila|<ref name="Ylesia" />}}
'''Barefoot Squadron''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] that utilized [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighters]] and was formed between [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]] and [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Led by the young [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Tahiri Veila]], the squadron took its name from how Veila preferred to walk, and it was composed of mostly rookie [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]]. An [[Unidentified executive officer|executive officer]] helped with the squadron's organization.

==History==
{{Quote|She's more experienced that [sic] most of her pilots—almost all of them are green—and she fought well at Borleias. Kre'fey's given her a good executive officer to help her with organization and red tape.|Jaina Solo, on Tahiri Veila|<ref name="Ylesia" />}}
Barefoot Squadron was one<ref name="Ylesia" /> of many [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] formed<ref name="Destiny">''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''</ref> between [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]] and [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]<ref name="Note" /> during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]—in which the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invaded [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]—when the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] began grouping new [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] straight out of flight schools with more experienced pilots from existing squadrons to create new starfighter units.<ref name="Destiny" /> At the [[Time/Legends|time]] of its creation, Barefoot Squadron was composed of mostly rookie pilots, and its [[Commanding officer/Legends|commander]] was the teenage [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Tahiri Veila]], who preferred to walk barefoot, thus inspiring the squadron's name. The pilots of Barefoot Squadron were very protective of Veila. To help Veila deal with red tape and the organization of the squadron, New Republic [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Traest Kre'fey]] assigned the squadron an [[Unidentified executive officer|executive officer]].<ref name="Ylesia" />

==Equipment==
The members of Barefoot Squadron utilized [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] as their starfighters.<ref name="TCSWE" />

==Members==
{{Quote|The Barefoots' real problem is the same one most of us have—too high a percentage of rookie pilots.|Jaina Solo|<ref name="Ylesia" />}}
[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Knight Tahiri Veila was the squadron's commander, with most of the pilots being rookies at the time of the squadron's creation. An executive [[Officer/Legends|officer]] was also with the squadron to help Veila with its organization.<ref name="Ylesia" />

==Behind the scenes==
Barefoot Squadron was first mentioned in [[2002]]'s [[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia|''Ylesia'']], an [[eBook]] novella written by [[Walter Jon Williams]] as part of [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series.<ref name="Ylesia" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia]]'' {{1stm}}
